name: job-portal-root
description: Root package to manage microservices for local development

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix services/auth && npm install --prefix services/job && npm install --prefix services/payment && npm install --prefix services/user && npm install --prefix services/utils
scripts.build:all: npm run build --prefix services/auth && npm run build --prefix services/job && npm run build --prefix services/payment && npm run build --prefix services/user && npm run build --prefix services/utils
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n "AUTH,JOB,PAYMENT,USER,UTILS,FRONTEND" -c "bgBlue.bold,bgMagenta.bold,bgYellow.bold,bgCyan.bold,bgGreen.bold,bgWhite.bold" "npm run dev --prefix services/auth" "npm run dev --prefix services/job" "npm run dev --prefix services/payment" "npm run dev --prefix services/user" "npm run dev --prefix services/utils" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
